debug.c(3) Library Functions Manual debug.c(3)

NAME

debug.c - Debug options registry (backtrace, sync-state).

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_debug_entries []

Detailed Description

Debug options registry (backtrace, sync-state).

Debug-only options for development and troubleshooting.

Definition in file debug.c.

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_debug_entries[]

Definition at line 14 of file debug.c.

15     {"sync-state",
16      '\0',
17      OPTION_TYPE_DOUBLE,
18      offsetof(options_t, debug_sync_state_time),
19      &default_debug_sync_state_time_value,
20      sizeof(double),
21      "Print synchronization primitive state with optional time offset (debug builds only).",
22      "DEBUG",
23      "TIME",
24      false,  // required

56      sizeof(double),
